nasb.text: The Lord appeared to him from afar, saying, “I have loved you with an everlasting love; Therefore I have drawn you with lovingkindness.

esv.text: the Lord appeared to him from far away. I have loved you with an everlasting love; therefore I have continued my faithfulness to you.

cnv.text: 耶和華在古時曾向以色列顯現，說： “我以永遠的愛愛你， 因此，我對你的慈愛延續不息。

ccb.text: 从前，耶和华向以色列显现，说： “我以永远不变的爱爱你， 我以慈爱吸引你到我身边。
